name: claude-startup-finance
description: Unofficial Claude connectors and finance workflows for the startup back-office stack. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Stripe, Ramp, Mercury, Intuit, or Anthropic.

plugins.name: startup-finance
plugins.description: Bundles Stripe, Ramp, Mercury, and QuickBooks connectors with cross-tool finance skills: runway & burn, revenue reconciliation, and a board-metrics pack.
